Name: the Rim Collection
Description: The Rim Collection is a small nation-state emerging from the ashes of the Rim Worlds Republic. Founded by citizens yearning to revive the Republic's pre-Amaris ideals, the Collection fiercely guards its independence.
ReputationStatements: Trust is difficult for us after your actions, but it would appear we have little choice.
History has dealt us enough bad cards already. We don't need another.
Every frontier world survives by taking calculated risks. This is one of them.
Welcome mercenary forces. Perhaps you have arrived to tip the odds in our favor?
The Collection is trying to build something special here. With your help, we can stabilize these worlds.
You've brought us good fortune more than once. Though I'd rather call it skill.
You've fought for worlds most of the Inner Sphere barely remembers. You and your team are always welcome here.
MissionSuccessStatements: Some people call it luck. We call it good judgment and better allies.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: Not every hand is a winner. At least you played yours to the end.
BadFaithFailureStatements: The people here will pay for this failure long after your DropShip leaves orbit.
